landing.title: Career Kit
landing.subtitle: AI-powered CV optimization for job applications.
landing.heroSubtitle: AI that sharpens your CV, writes your cover letter, and reveals what companies really expect.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to land the role
landing.feature1Desc: Paste a job description. Get a tailored CV in seconds.
landing.feature2Desc: Three tones. Personalized to the role and company.
landing.feature3Desc: Know what they really expect before you apply.
landing.step1Desc: Drop your PDF — we extract the content automatically.
landing.step2Desc: Copy-paste from any job listing. We handle the rest.
landing.step3Desc: Tailored CV, cover letter, keyword analysis, and company insights — ready to apply.
landing.providersTitle: Powered by the best AI models
landing.providersDesc: Choose your AI provider or compare results across all three.
landing.ctaFooterTrust: Free to use. No credit card required.
